item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan yang hanya fokus pada kepentingan masyarakat bisa mengabaikan kebebasan atau keadilan bagi sebagian orang.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that Indonesian family, togetherness, and law often prioritize society, then shifts at turn 3 into rights, minority, and fairness caveats and ends focused on local participation and inclusion. Agent B starts opposed to society always taking precedence, then moves toward a balanced participation/accountability frame while keeping concern about minority oppression and dissent.
